titleStmt.title: SII 41.171: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 171. (A.R. No. 389 of 1905.) Kāvēripākkam, Arakkōṇam Taluk, North Arcot District. On the south wall of the central Shrine of the Varadarāja Perumāḷ Temple at Kāvēripākkam,

summary.p: Registers a tax-free gift of land to the temple of Aḻgiyaperāmāḷ at Kāvirippākkam alias Vijaya Gaṇḍagōpala chaturvēdi maṅgalam by Saḷukki Nārayanaṉ Alluvīramarasan. The land was made as kuḍinīṅgā-tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam, as registered in uḷvari of the sabhā of the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉac cakkaravat
tikaḷ śrīvijayakaṇṭa kopāla
tevaṟku yāṇṭu pattoṉpatāvatu
kāvirippākkamāṉa vicaiyakaṇṭa
kopālac caturvetimaṅkalattu nā
yaṉār Aḻakiyaperumāḷukkuc caḷukki nārā
yaṇaṉ Alluvamaracaṉeṉ Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku
caḷukki nārāyaṇaṉ cantikku Amutupaṭi
kkum cāttuppaṭikkum Ivvūr Uṭ
kaṭṭaḷaiyil viṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭu
veliyiṉāl kuḻi nālāyiramum kuṭinīṅkā
t tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka sabhaiyā
r Iṭṭut tanta taṭi yuḷvarippaṭiye śa
ntrātittavarai cellak kaṭavatāka viṭ
ṭōm Innilattāl vanta kaṭamai
yum Āyamum maṟṟumaṉaittāyaṅkaḷ
Uṭpaṭa viṭṭom Ippaṭi ceyvate
Ivai caḷukkinārāyaṇaṉ
Alluvimaracaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 41.171 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
